_comment: Open building-footprint overlay catalog. Microsoft, ODbL. source: us-legacy (US state .geojson.zip) or ms-global (world country quadkey GeoJSONL via global-buildings/dataset-links.csv, selected by `location`; `qkprefix` selects a sub-national CHUNK). Big countries (>1500MB compressed source) are split into quadkey-prefix chunks each <=~1500MB so they fit CI + host under GitHub's 2GB/asset limit + download in reasonable pieces — the app's smallest-covering-box rule picks the chunk covering the user's area (no app change). bbox=[S,W,N,E] (US=Geofabrik bounds; countries/chunks=union of the dataset's z9 quadkey tiles). `group` (us|world|chunk) keeps each dispatch under GitHub's 256-job matrix cap. Built by scripts/build-overlay-region.sh (SOURCE + QKPREFIX env), workflow building-overlays.yml (pass `group`).

regions.name: Saint Helena Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
